# CWE-250 positive: world-writable permissions on data file (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-250-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// CWE-250 Execution with Unnecessary Privileges
// Vulnerable line: chmod grants read/write/execute to all users.
func WriteRuntimeState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := "/etc/app/state.json"
	body, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "body", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if err := os.WriteFile(path, body, 0o777); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "write", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "saved"})
}
